validity.reason: Methodology + instrumentation defects make this run non-comparable and non-publishable. (1) STABILITY: the harness reused the production SchedulerConfig cache_size=3 (tuned for short conversational turns), which starves the KV cache at 16K/32K context, forcing block eviction + prefill recompute/preemption -> pathological, high-variance TTFT (310,715 ms @ 32K fp16; 47s-vs-311s spread at N=2). (2) MEASUREMENT VALIDITY: the flat ~20.85 GB peak across every precision shows host 'Available MBytes' sampling cannot see the GPU KV pool (driver pre-reserves it at load), so peak_used_gb says nothing about the KV-precision memory lever this sweep was built to measure. Quantifying that lever needs GPU-allocation-level instrumentation (OpenVINO GPU memory statistics or a Level-Zero GPU-memory-used metric). Do NOT contribute these numbers to the OpenVINO/HuggingFace community dataset. Retained for audit + methodology-failure record; supersede with a fixed-harness re-run.
validity.preserves_original_data: Every field below is the original measured output, byte-unchanged. Only this top-level 'validity' block was added.
